  "description": "Career Breedge Consultancy Limited is a comprehensive Talent Development and Management organization committed to empowering young, aspiring professionals and equipping businesses with bespoke HR solutions.

Through world-class professional training, counseling, and skills development programs, we help job seekers and career professionals become sought-after talents while assisting businesses in optimizing their workforce for maximum productivity.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are committed to structural excellence and quality delivery, and hence we are looking for a competent Civil Engineer to oversee and execute construction projects effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise construction projects from start to finish
	Conduct site assessments and quality control checks
	Ensure structural integrity and compliance
	Manage contractors and site workers
	Monitor timelines, budgets, and safety standards.


Requirements


	B.Eng./HND in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 3 years of construction experience
	Strong technical and site management skills
	Proficiency in engineering software
	Excellent leadership and problem-solving ability.


Expected Performance Standards:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified persons should send their applications and CV to&nbsp;admin@endlexgroup.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the&nbsp;subject of the mail.",

Civil Engineer Job at Career Breedge Consultancy Limited




        
    

        
        Career Breedge Consultancy Limited is a comprehensive Talent Development and Management organization committed to empowering young, aspiring professionals and equipping businesses with bespoke HR solutions.

Through world-class professional training, counseling, and skills development programs, we help job seekers and career professionals become sought-after talents while assisting businesses in optimizing their workforce for maximum productivity.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are committed to structural excellence and quality delivery, and hence we are looking for a competent Civil Engineer to oversee and execute construction projects effectively.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise construction projects from start to finish
	Conduct site assessments and quality control checks
	Ensure structural integrity and compliance
	Manage contractors and site workers
	Monitor timelines, budgets, and safety standards.


Requirements


	B.Eng./HND in Civil Engineering
	Minimum of 3 years of construction experience
	Strong technical and site management skills
	Proficiency in engineering software
	Excellent leadership and problem-solving ability.


Expected Performance Standards:


	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and in a team
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Goal-oriented with a strong drive for results.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified persons should send their applications and CV to admin@endlexgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Siperco Nigeria Limited
content:
Siperco Nigeria Limited is currently recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Sales Representative

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Sales & Marketing
Company: Siperco Nigeria Limited

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Corporate Sales Representative to identify business opportunities, build strong relationships with corporate clients, and drive revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for promoting the company's products and services to organizations, negotiating contracts, and achieving sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new corporate business opportunities and partnerships.
	Promote and sell company products and services to corporate clients and organizations.
	Build and maintain strong long-term relationships with clients.
	Conduct market research to identify potential clients and emerging market trends.
	Prepare and deliver professional sales presentations and proposals.
	Negotiate contracts and close sales deals to meet company targets.
	Maintain accurate records of sales activities, leads, and customer interactions.
	Collaborate with the marketing team to develop sales strategies and campaigns.
	Attend business meetings, networking events, and industry conferences.
	Provide after-sales support to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
	Prepare periodic sales reports and performance analysis for management.


Requirement


	HND, OND or BSc Degree in Marketing, Sales, or related fields.


Application Closing Date: 21st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Olaniyanoluwatimileyin3@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Factory Supervisor - Production Floor

Job Location: Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Factory Supervisor is responsible for overseeing daily activities of production floor workers, particularly workers involved in product finishing, trimming of jerry cans, cutting excess materials, sorting, and other post-production processes.
	The role ensures optimal workforce coordination, compliance with laid down procedures, and timely achievement of production targets, proper discipline, and accurate reporting of daily operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Supervise and coordinate the activities of workers on the factory floor.
	Ensure workers are properly assigned to their respective duties for effective and timely completion of production tasks.
	Ensure production targets are met in good condition without compromising quality standards.
	Enforce compliance with company policies, safety standards, and laid down operational procedures.
	Oversee trimming, cutting of excess materials, sorting, and general product finishing activities.
	Properly arrange and monitor workers break periods to ensure production activities are not disrupted.
	Maintain discipline, punctuality, and accountability among workers.
	Ensure proper housekeeping and cleanliness of assigned production areas.
	Prevent backlog of unfinished or untrimmed products.
	Monitor workforce utilization to minimize idle time.
	Identify and report misconduct, inefficiencies, or operational concerns promptly.
	Prepare and submit accurate daily production and attendance reports.
	Liaise with Production, Quality Control, and HR departments regarding workforce performance and operational issues.


Qualifications & Experience


	OND, HND, or B.Sc. in any relevant discipline.
	4–8 years of experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Prior experience as a Factory Supervisor in a plastic manufacturing company is highly required.
	Proven ability to manage workers effectively.
	Demonstrated integrity, leadership ability, and strong sense of responsibility.
	Good communication and reporting skills.
	Sound understanding of production floor operations and safety procedures.
	Applicants must be between 28-40 years.


Salary
Negotiable based on experience.

Application Closing Date: 30th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrsiperco@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) PET Machine Technician

Job Location: Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The PET Machine Technician will be responsible for operating, monitoring, and maintaining PET production machines to ensure efficient production of quality preforms and finished bottles.
	The role involves ensuring machines run optimally with minimal downtime while maintaining adherence to safety and quality standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Operate and monitor the following machines effectively:
	Semi Auto PET Machine (172-880)
	Injection Preform Machine (Haitian)
	2-Stage Fully Automatic Injection Stretch Blow Machine
	1-Stage Injection Stretch Blow Machine (ASB)
	Set up machines for production runs in line with specified parameters.
	Carry out routine machine checks before and during production.
	Ensure production targets are achieved without compromising quality standards.
	Troubleshoot minor mechanical faults during operation.
	Minimize material wastage during production processes.
	Maintain accurate production records and machine performance reports.
	Ensure compliance with safety procedures and operational guidelines.
	Monitor heating systems, pressure settings, and mold performance.
	Maintain cleanliness and proper housekeeping of assigned machine area.
	Report technical faults or production irregularities promptly.
	Assist maintenance team during major repairs or servicing when required.
	Ensure machines are properly shut down after production.


Qualifications & Experience


	OND and/or Trade Test I, II & III in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or any related discipline.
	Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience operating PET production machines in a plastic manufacturing company.
	Strong technical knowledge of Injection Stretch Blow Molding (ISBM) processes.
	Ability to troubleshoot and resolve machine faults.
	Good understanding of safety and quality control procedures.
	Demonstrated Integrity, Responsibility and Teamwork.
	Ability to work with Minimal Supervision.


Remuneration


	Pay: Negotiable based on experience.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrsiperco@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates with the needed experience should apply.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
